channel.title: Journal of Latin Linguistics
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in Journal of Latin Linguistics

item.title: Dormivit et resurgit. A language-ecology approach to the diachrony of the Latin ingressive perfect
item.description: Article by Elena V. Zheltova DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/joll-2024-2006

item.title: Nisi paria non pugnant: argument structure alternations with lexical reciprocal verbs in Latin
item.description: Article by Elena V. Zheltova DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/joll-2024-2005

item.title: The synchrony and diachrony of example markers in Latin
item.description: Article by Elena V. Zheltova DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/joll-2024-2004

item.title: Ecce in Archaic Latin: interjection or demonstrative?
item.description: Article by Elena V. Zheltova DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/joll-2024-2007

item.title: (H)ariuga/(h)aruiga: an etymological research
item.description: Article by Elena V. Zheltova DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/joll-2024-2002

item.title: Discontinuity of the noun phrase in Roman statutes from the Republican period
item.description: Article by Elena V. Zheltova DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/joll-2024-2001

item.title: Qui pro quo in Plautus’ grammar
item.description: Article by Elena V. Zheltova DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/joll-2024-2003
